title: Close the tag
statement:
You are given HTML where the bold tag is opened but never closed. The browser gets confused and bolds everything after it.

Close it so that only the price is bold.

examples.explain: Only “20 lv” is bold. Everything else is normal.

constraints: Spaces and capitalisation do not matter

why.no-closing: You opened the tag but never closed it. The browser does not know where to stop, so it bolds everything to the end.
why.text-changed: The text has changed. The task is only to close the tag — the words stay as they are.
why.wrong-order:
You closed the tag, but in the wrong place — after the closing paragraph. Tags close in reverse order: the last one opened closes first. You opened

, then → close first, then

.
